title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Kabir Zafar
body: "Teacher’s name: Mr Kabir Zafar  Location teacher worked: Huddersfield, Yorkshire and The Humber   Date of professional conduct panel: 22 September 2025 to 25 September 2025  Outcome type: No order made  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr Kabir Zafar formerly employed in Huddersfield, Yorkshire and The Humber.    Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
